en.delivery_completed_body: Your delivery of {amount} {unit} has been completed.
en.request_accepted_body: {worker} has accepted your delivery request and is on the way.
en.scheduled_accepted_body: {worker} has accepted your scheduled delivery and is on the way.
en.payment_received_body: Payment of {amount} {currency} received for {quantity} {unit}. Thank you!
en.new_task_assigned_body: Admin assigned you a new delivery request.
en.request_assigned_body: Your request has been assigned to a worker.
en.low_inventory_body: Coupon size {size} is running low. Only {remaining} left in stock.
en.new_delivery_request_body: You have a new delivery request from {client}.
en.coupon_assigned_body: You have been assigned to deliver a coupon book to {clientName}.
en.request_cancelled_body: Your delivery request has been cancelled.
en.request_submitted_body: Your delivery request for {amount} {unit} has been received.
en.error_insufficient_inventory: Insufficient inventory. You have {current} {unit} but reported {delivered} delivered.
en.error_insufficient_coupons: Insufficient coupons. Client has {remaining} coupons but {required} are needed.
en.error_already_completed: This delivery has already been completed
en.error_not_assigned: This delivery is not assigned to you

ar.request_accepted_body: قام {worker} بقبول طلب التوصيل الخاص بك وهو في الطريق إليك.
ar.scheduled_accepted_body: قام {worker} بقبول التوصيل المجدول وهو في الطريق إليك.
ar.delivery_eta_body: سيصل {worker} مع {amount} {unit} في تمام الساعة {delivery_time} تقريباً.
ar.payment_received_body: تم استلام دفعة بقيمة {amount} {currency} مقابل {quantity} {unit}. شكراً لك!
ar.new_task_assigned_body: قام المسؤول بتعيين طلب توصيل جديد لك.
ar.low_inventory_body: حجم الكوبون {size} ينفد. متبقي {remaining} فقط في المخزون.
ar.coupon_assigned_body: لقد تم تعيينك لتوصيل دفتر كوبونات إلى {clientName}.
ar.request_cancelled_body: تم إلغاء طلب التوصيل الخاص بك.
ar.request_submitted_body: تم استلام طلب التوصيل الخاص بك لـ {amount} {unit}.
ar.error_insufficient_inventory: المخزون غير كافٍ. لديك {current} {unit} ولكن تم الإبلاغ عن توصيل {delivered}.
ar.error_insufficient_coupons: الكوبونات غير كافية. لدى العميل {remaining} كوبون ولكن يحتاج إلى {required}.
